records.stderr_pattern: Timeout was reached|network failure seems to have happened|spurious network error
records.description: Cargo network timeout — increase retries and timeout, use git CLI

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "warning: spurious network error (3 tries remaining): [28] Timeout was reached" >&2; echo "error: network failure seems to have happened" >&2; exit 1'

records.stderr_pattern: Couldn't connect to server|Failed to connect to.*crates\.io|Connection timed out
records.description: Registry unreachable — fall back to offline mode or increase retries

reproduction.command: bash -c 'echo "error: failed to download from https://static.crates.io" >&2; echo "Couldnt connect to server; Connection timed out" >&2; exit 1'
